text: Being here, I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The glass enclosure separates me from a creative environment dedicated to research and development, its bright colors and bold letters inviting me in. I am drawn to the displays and their promises of innovation and understanding—the merging of human thought with intelligent machines intrigues me deeply. There is a quiet energy; almost as if every object here is gently prodding me to rethink how I engage with the world and technology. A sense of discovery pulses in the air.
